sEn: Deformable Convolution and Deformable RoI Pooling enhance CNNs' ability to model geometric transformations by learning spatial offsets without extra supervision.
sZh: 可变形卷积和可变形RoI池化通过学习空间偏移，无需额外监督，增强了CNN对几何变换的建模能力。
absEn: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) are inherently limited to model geometric transformations due to the fixed geometric structures in its building modules. In this work, we introduce two new modules to enhance the transformation modeling capacity of CNNs, namely, deformable convolution and deformable RoI pooling. Both are based on the idea of augmenting the spatial sampling locations in the modules with additional offsets and learning the offsets from target tasks, without additional supervision. The new modules can readily replace their plain counterparts in existing CNNs and can be easily trained end-to-end by standard back-propagation, giving rise to deformable convolutional networks. Extensive experiments validate the effectiveness of our approach on sophisticated vision tasks of object detection and semantic segmentation. The code would be released.
absZh: 卷积神经网络（CNN）由于其构建模块中的固定几何结构，本质上难以建模几何变换。在这项工作中，我们引入了两个新模块来增强CNN的变换建模能力，即可变形卷积和可变形RoI池化。两者都基于在模块中增加空间采样位置的偏移量，并从目标任务中学习这些偏移量，无需额外监督。这些新模块可以轻松替换现有CNN中的普通对应模块，并通过标准反向传播进行端到端训练，从而形成可变形卷积网络。大量实验验证了我们的方法在目标检测和语义分割等复杂视觉任务上的有效性。代码将开源。

contrib.en: Introduces deformable convolution and deformable RoI pooling to enhance CNNs' geometric transformation modeling.
contrib.zh: 提出可变形卷积和可变形RoI池化，增强CNN对几何变换的建模能力。

contrib.en: Modules learn spatial offsets from target tasks without extra supervision, enabling adaptive sampling.
contrib.zh: 模块从目标任务学习空间偏移，无需额外监督，实现自适应采样。

contrib.en: Deformable modules are lightweight, plug-and-play, and trainable end-to-end via standard backpropagation.
contrib.zh: 可变形模块轻量、即插即用，可通过标准反向传播端到端训练。

contrib.en: First demonstration that learning dense spatial transformations in deep CNNs is effective for object detection and semantic segmentation.
contrib.zh: 首次证明在深度CNN中学习密集空间变换对目标检测和语义分割有效。

contrib.en: Extensive experiments show significant accuracy improvements over plain CNNs on PASCAL VOC and COCO.
contrib.zh: 大量实验表明，在PASCAL VOC和COCO上相比普通CNN精度显著提升。

contrib.en: Code is publicly released to facilitate reproducibility and further research.
contrib.zh: 代码已公开，便于复现和进一步研究。

limits.en: Offsets are learned per image location, increasing model complexity and training time slightly.
limits.zh: 偏移量按图像位置学习，略微增加模型复杂度和训练时间。

limits.en: Deformable convolution may not generalize well to tasks with very different geometric transformations.
limits.zh: 可变形卷积可能难以泛化到几何变换差异很大的任务。

limits.en: The method assumes offsets are fractional and uses bilinear interpolation, which may introduce approximation errors.
limits.zh: 方法假设偏移为分数并使用双线性插值，可能引入近似误差。

limits.en: Performance gains are task-dependent and may saturate with many deformable layers.
limits.zh: 性能提升依赖于任务，且随可变形层数增加可能饱和。

limits.en: The approach has not been tested on 3D data or video tasks, limiting its scope.
limits.zh: 该方法未在3D数据或视频任务上测试，适用范围有限。

items.en: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) are inherently limited to model geometric transformations due to the fixed geometric structures in their building modules. In this work, we introduce two new modules to enhance the transformation modeling capability of CNNs, namely, deformable convolution and deformable RoI pooling. Both are based on the idea of augmenting the spatial sampling locations in the modules with additional offsets and learning the offsets from the target tasks, without additional supervision. The new modules can readily replace their plain counterparts in existing CNNs and can be easily trained end-to-end by standard back-propagation, giving rise to deformable convolutional networks. Extensive experiments validate the performance of our approach. For the first time, we show that learning dense spatial transformation in deep CNNs is effective for sophisticated vision tasks such as object detection and semantic segmentation. The code is released at https://github.com/msracver/Deformable-ConvNets.
items.zh: 卷积神经网络（CNN）由于其构建模块中固定的几何结构，本质上限制了其对几何变换的建模能力。在这项工作中，我们引入了两个新模块来增强CNN的变换建模能力，即可变形卷积和可变形RoI池化。两者都基于在模块中增加空间采样位置的偏移量，并从目标任务中学习偏移量，无需额外监督。新模块可以轻松替换现有CNN中的普通对应模块，并通过标准反向传播进行端到端训练，从而产生可变形卷积网络。大量实验验证了我们方法的性能。我们首次证明，在深度CNN中学习密集空间变换对于复杂的视觉任务（如目标检测和语义分割）是有效的。代码已发布在 https://github.com/msracver/Deformable-ConvNets。

items.en: A key challenge in visual recognition is how to accommodate geometric variations or model geometric transformations in object scale, pose, viewpoint, and part deformation. In general, there are two ways. The first is to build the training datasets with sufficient desired variations. This is usually realized by augmenting the existing data samples, e.g., by affine transformation. Robust representations can be learned from the data, but usually at the cost of expensive training and complex model parameters. The second is to use transformation-invariant features and algorithms. This category subsumes many well known techniques, such as SIFT (scale invariant feature transform) [42] and sliding window based object detection paradigm.
items.zh: 视觉识别中的一个关键挑战是如何适应几何变化或建模物体尺度、姿态、视角和部件变形中的几何变换。通常有两种方法。第一种是构建具有足够所需变化的训练数据集。这通常通过增强现有数据样本来实现，例如通过仿射变换。可以从数据中学习鲁棒的表示，但通常以昂贵的训练和复杂的模型参数为代价。第二种是使用变换不变的特征和算法。这一类包括许多众所周知的技术，例如SIFT（尺度不变特征变换）[42]和基于滑动窗口的目标检测范式。

items.en: There are two drawbacks in above ways. First, the geometric transformations are assumed fixed and known. Such prior knowledge is used to augment the data, and design the features and algorithms. This assumption prevents generalization to new tasks possessing unknown geometric transformations, which are not properly modeled. Second, hand-crafted design of invariant features and algorithms could be difficult or infeasible for overly complex transformations, even when they are known.
items.zh: 上述方法有两个缺点。首先，几何变换被假定为固定且已知的。这种先验知识用于增强数据以及设计特征和算法。这种假设阻止了泛化到具有未知几何变换的新任务，这些变换未被适当建模。其次，对于过于复杂的变换，即使已知，手工设计不变特征和算法也可能困难或不可行。

items.en: Recently, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) [35] have achieved significant success for visual recognition tasks, such as image classification [31], semantic segmentation [41], and object detection [16]. Nevertheless, they still share the above two drawbacks. Their capability of modeling geometric transformations mostly comes from the extensive data augmentation, the large model capacity, and some simple hand-crafted modules (e.g., max-pooling [1] for small translation-invariance).
items.zh: 最近，卷积神经网络（CNN）[35]在视觉识别任务中取得了显著成功，例如图像分类[31]、语义分割[41]和目标检测[16]。然而，它们仍然存在上述两个缺点。它们建模几何变换的能力主要来自广泛的数据增强、大模型容量以及一些简单的手工模块（例如，用于小平移不变性的最大池化[1]）。

items.en: In short, CNNs are inherently limited to model large, unknown transformations. The limitation originates from the fixed geometric structures of CNN modules: a convolution unit samples the input feature map at fixed locations; a pooling layer reduces the spatial resolution at a fixed ratio; a RoI (region-of-interest) pooling layer separates a RoI into fixed spatial bins, etc. There lacks internal mechanisms to handle the geometric transformations. This causes noticeable problems. For one example, the receptive field sizes of all activation units in the same CNN layer are the same. This is undesirable for high level CNN layers that encode the semantics over spatial locations. Because different locations may correspond to objects with different scales or deformation, adaptive determination of scales or receptive field sizes is desirable for visual recognition with fine localization, e.g., semantic segmentation using fully convolutional networks [41]. For another example, while object detection has seen significant and rapid progress [16, 52, 15, 47, 46, 40, 7] recently, all approaches still rely on the primitive bounding box based feature extraction. This is clearly sub-optimal, especially for non-rigid objects.
items.zh: 简而言之，CNN本质上受限于建模大型未知变换。这种限制源于CNN模块的固定几何结构：卷积单元在固定位置对输入特征图进行采样；池化层以固定比例降低空间分辨率；RoI（感兴趣区域）池化层将RoI划分为固定的空间箱等。缺乏处理几何变换的内部机制。这导致了明显的问题。例如，同一CNN层中所有激活单元的感受野大小相同。这对于编码空间位置语义的高层CNN层来说是不希望的。因为不同位置可能对应不同尺度或变形的物体，自适应确定尺度或感受野大小对于需要精确定位的视觉识别（例如，使用全卷积网络的语义分割[41]）是可取的。再例如，尽管目标检测最近取得了显著而快速的进展[16, 52, 15, 47, 46, 40, 7]，但所有方法仍然依赖于原始的基于边界框的特征提取。这显然不是最优的，尤其是对于非刚性物体。

items.en: In this work, we introduce two new modules that greatly enhance CNNs’ capability of modeling geometric transformations. The first is deformable convolution. It adds 2D offsets to the regular grid sampling locations in the standard convolution. It enables free form deformation of the sampling grid. It is illustrated in Figure 1. The offsets are learned from the preceding feature maps, via additional convolutional layers. Thus, the deformation is conditioned on the input features in a local, dense, and adaptive manner.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们引入了两个新模块，大大增强了CNN建模几何变换的能力。第一个是可变形卷积。它在标准卷积的规则网格采样位置添加了2D偏移量。它允许采样网格的自由形式变形。如图1所示。偏移量通过额外的卷积层从前面的特征图中学习。因此，变形以局部、密集和自适应的方式取决于输入特征。

items.en: The second is deformable RoI pooling. It adds an offset to each bin position in the regular bin partition of the previous RoI pooling [15, 7]. Similarly, the offsets are learned from the preceding feature maps and the RoIs, enabling adaptive part localization for objects with different shapes.
items.zh: 第二个是可变形RoI池化。它在先前RoI池化[15, 7]的规则箱划分中为每个箱位置添加了一个偏移量。类似地，偏移量从前面的特征图和RoI中学习，从而实现对不同形状物体的自适应部件定位。

items.en: Both modules are light weight. They add small amount of parameters and computation for the offset learning. They can readily replace their plain counterparts in deep CNNs and can be easily trained end-to-end with standard backpropagation. The resulting CNNs are called deformable convolutional networks, or deformable ConvNets.
items.zh: 两个模块都很轻量。它们为偏移学习增加了少量参数和计算。它们可以轻松替换深度CNN中的普通对应模块，并通过标准反向传播进行端到端训练。由此产生的CNN称为可变形卷积网络，或可变形ConvNets。

items.en: Our approach shares similar high level spirit with spatial transform networks [26] and deformable part models [11]. They all have internal transformation parameters and learn such parameters purely from data. A key difference in deformable ConvNets is that they deal with dense spatial transformations in a simple, efficient, deep and end-to-end manner. In Section 3.1, we discuss in details the relation of our work to previous works and analyze the superiority of deformable ConvNets.
items.zh: 我们的方法与空间变换网络[26]和可变形部件模型[11]具有相似的高级精神。它们都有内部变换参数，并纯粹从数据中学习这些参数。可变形ConvNets的一个关键区别在于它们以简单、高效、深度和端到端的方式处理密集空间变换。在第3.1节中，我们详细讨论了我们的工作与先前工作的关系，并分析了可变形ConvNets的优越性。

items.en: The feature maps and convolution in CNNs are 3D. Both deformable convolution and RoI pooling modules operate on the 2D spatial domain. The operation remains the same across the channel dimension. Without loss of generality, the modules are described in 2D here for notation clarity. Extension to 3D is straightforward.
items.zh: CNN中的特征图和卷积是3D的。可变形卷积和RoI池化模块都在2D空间域上操作。操作在通道维度上保持不变。不失一般性，这里为了符号清晰，在2D中描述模块。扩展到3D是直接的。

items.en: As illustrated in Figure 2, the offsets are obtained by applying a convolutional layer over the same input feature map. The convolution kernel is of the same spatial resolution and dilation as those of the current convolutional layer (e.g., also 3×3333\times 3 with dilation 1 in Figure 2). The output offset fields have the same spatial resolution with the input feature map. The channel dimension 2​N2𝑁2N corresponds to N𝑁N 2D offsets. During training, both the convolutional kernels for generating the output features and the offsets are learned simultaneously. To learn the offsets, the gradients are back-propagated through the bilinear operations in Eq. (3) and Eq. (4). It is detailed in appendix A.

items.en: Position-Sensitive (PS) RoI Pooling [7] It is fully convolutional and different from RoI pooling. Through a conv layer, all the input feature maps are firstly converted to k2superscript𝑘2k^{2} score maps for each object class (totally C+1𝐶1C+1 for C𝐶C object classes), as illustrated in the bottom branch in Figure 4. Without need to distinguish between classes, such score maps are denoted as {𝐱i,j}subscript𝐱𝑖𝑗\{\mathbf{x}_{i,j}\} where (i,j)𝑖𝑗(i,j) enumerates all bins. Pooling is performed on these score maps. The output value for (i,j)𝑖𝑗(i,j)-th bin is obtained by summation from one score map 𝐱i,jsubscript𝐱𝑖𝑗\mathbf{x}_{i,j} corresponding to that bin. In short, the difference from RoI pooling in Eq.(5) is that a general feature map 𝐱𝐱\mathbf{x} is replaced by a specific positive-sensitive score map 𝐱i,jsubscript𝐱𝑖𝑗\mathbf{x}_{i,j}.
items.zh: 位置敏感（PS）RoI 池化 [7] 它是全卷积的，与 RoI 池化不同。通过一个卷积层，所有输入特征图首先被转换为每个目标类别的 k² 个得分图（对于 C 个目标类别，总共 C+1 个），如图 4 底部分支所示。无需区分类别，这些得分图记为 {𝐱i,j}，其中 (i,j) 枚举所有 bin。在这些得分图上进行池化。第 (i,j) 个 bin 的输出值通过对应该 bin 的一个得分图 𝐱i,j 求和得到。简而言之，与公式 (5) 中的 RoI 池化的区别在于，通用特征图 𝐱 被替换为特定的位置敏感得分图 𝐱i,j。

items.en: In deformable PS RoI pooling, the only change in Eq. (6) is that 𝐱𝐱\mathbf{x} is also modified to 𝐱i,jsubscript𝐱𝑖𝑗\mathbf{x}_{i,j}. However, the offset learning is different. It follows the “fully convolutional” spirit in [7], as illustrated in Figure 4. In the top branch, a conv layer generates the full spatial resolution offset fields. For each RoI (also for each class), PS RoI pooling is applied on such fields to obtain normalized offsets Δ​𝐩^i​jΔsubscript^𝐩𝑖𝑗\Delta\widehat{\mathbf{p}}_{ij}, which are then transformed to the real offsets Δ​𝐩i​jΔsubscript𝐩𝑖𝑗\Delta\mathbf{p}_{ij} in the same way as in deformable RoI pooling described above.
items.zh: 在可变形 PS RoI 池化中，公式 (6) 的唯一变化是 𝐱 也被修改为 𝐱i,j。然而，偏移学习不同。它遵循 [7] 中的“全卷积”精神，如图 4 所示。在顶部分支中，一个卷积层生成全空间分辨率的偏移场。对于每个 RoI（也对于每个类别），PS RoI 池化应用于这些场以获得归一化偏移 Δ𝐩̂ ij，然后按照上述可变形 RoI 池化的相同方式转换为实际偏移 Δ𝐩ij。

items.en: Both deformable convolution and RoI pooling modules have the same input and output as their plain versions. Hence, they can readily replace their plain counterparts in existing CNNs. In the training, these added conv and fc layers for offset learning are initialized with zero weights. Their learning rates are set to β𝛽\beta times (β=1𝛽1\beta=1 by default, and β=0.01𝛽0.01\beta=0.01 for the fc layer in Faster R-CNN) of the learning rate for the existing layers. They are trained via back propagation through the bilinear interpolation operations in Eq. (3) and Eq. (4). The resulting CNNs are called deformable ConvNets.
items.zh: 可变形卷积和 RoI 池化模块的输入和输出与其普通版本相同。因此，它们可以轻松替换现有 CNN 中的普通对应模块。在训练中，这些新增的用于偏移学习的卷积层和全连接层初始权重为零。它们的学习率设置为现有层学习率的 β 倍（默认 β=1，对于 Faster R-CNN 中的全连接层 β=0.01）。它们通过公式 (3) 和 (4) 中的双线性插值操作的反向传播进行训练。得到的 CNN 称为可变形 ConvNet。

items.en: To integrate deformable ConvNets with the state-of-the-art CNN architectures, we note that these architectures consist of two stages. First, a deep fully convolutional network generates feature maps over the whole input image. Second, a shallow task specific network generates results from the feature maps. We elaborate the two steps below.
items.zh: 为了将可变形 ConvNet 与最先进的 CNN 架构集成，我们注意到这些架构包括两个阶段。首先，一个深度全卷积网络在整个输入图像上生成特征图。其次，一个浅层任务特定网络从特征图生成结果。我们详细说明以下两个步骤。

items.en: Deformable Convolution for Feature Extraction We adopt two state-of-the-art architectures for feature extraction: ResNet-101 [22] and a modifed version of Inception-ResNet [51]. Both are pre-trained on ImageNet [8] classification dataset.
items.zh: 用于特征提取的可变形卷积 我们采用两种最先进的特征提取架构：ResNet-101 [22] 和修改版的 Inception-ResNet [51]。两者都在 ImageNet [8] 分类数据集上预训练。

items.en: The original Inception-ResNet is designed for image recognition. It has a feature misalignment issue and problematic for dense prediction tasks. It is modified to fix the alignment problem [20]. The modified version is dubbed as “Aligned-Inception-ResNet” and is detailed in appendix B.
items.zh: 原始的 Inception-ResNet 是为图像识别设计的。它存在特征未对齐问题，对密集预测任务有问题。它被修改以解决对齐问题 [20]。修改后的版本称为“Aligned-Inception-ResNet”，详见附录 B。

items.en: Both models consist of several convolutional blocks, an average pooling and a 1000-way fc layer for ImageNet classification. The average pooling and the fc layers are removed. A randomly initialized 1×1111\times 1 convolution is added at last to reduce the channel dimension to 102410241024. As in common practice [4, 7], the effective stride in the last convolutional block is reduced from 323232 pixels to 161616 pixels to increase the feature map resolution. Specifically, at the beginning of the last block, stride is changed from 222 to 111 (“conv5” for both ResNet-101 and Aligned-Inception-ResNet). To compensate, the dilation of all the convolution filters in this block (with kernel size >1absent1>1) is changed from 111 to 222.
items.zh: 两个模型都由几个卷积块、一个平均池化层和一个用于 ImageNet 分类的 1000 路全连接层组成。平均池化层和全连接层被移除。最后添加一个随机初始化的 1×1 卷积，将通道维度减少到 1024。按照常见做法 [4, 7]，最后一个卷积块的有效步长从 32 像素减少到 16 像素，以增加特征图分辨率。具体来说，在最后一个块的开头，步长从 2 改为 1（对于 ResNet-101 和 Aligned-Inception-ResNet 都是“conv5”）。为了补偿，该块中所有卷积滤波器（核大小 >1）的膨胀率从 1 改为 2。

items.en: Optionally, deformable convolution is applied to the last few convolutional layers (with kernel size >1absent1>1). We experimented with different numbers of such layers and found 333 as a good trade-off for different tasks, as reported in Table 1.
items.zh: 可选地，可变形卷积应用于最后几个卷积层（核大小 >1）。我们尝试了不同数量的此类层，发现 3 是不同任务的良好折衷，如表 1 所示。

items.en: Segmentation and Detection Networks A task specific network is built upon the output feature maps from the feature extraction network mentioned above.
items.zh: 分割和检测网络 在来自上述特征提取网络的输出特征图上构建任务特定网络。

items.en: In the below, C𝐶C denotes the number of object classes.
items.zh: 在下文中，C表示对象类别的数量。

items.en: DeepLab [5] is a state-of-the-art method for semantic segmentation. It adds a 1×1111\times 1 convolutional layer over the feature maps to generates (C+1)𝐶1(C+1) maps that represent the per-pixel classification scores. A following softmax layer then outputs the per-pixel probabilities.
items.zh: DeepLab [5] 是一种用于语义分割的最先进方法。它在特征图上添加一个1×1卷积层，生成(C+1)个表示逐像素分类分数的图。随后的softmax层输出逐像素概率。

items.en: Category-Aware RPN is almost the same as the region proposal network in [47], except that the 2-class (object or not) convolutional classifier is replaced by a (C+1)𝐶1(C+1)-class convolutional classifier. It can be considered as a simplified version of SSD [40].
items.zh: 类别感知RPN与[47]中的区域提议网络几乎相同，只是将2类（对象或非对象）卷积分类器替换为(C+1)类卷积分类器。它可以被视为SSD [40]的简化版本。

items.en: Faster R-CNN [47] is the state-of-the-art detector. In our implementation, the RPN branch is added on the top of the conv4 block, following [47]. In the previous practice [22, 24], the RoI pooling layer is inserted between the conv4 and the conv5 blocks in ResNet-101, leaving 10 layers for each RoI. This design achieves good accuracy but has high per-RoI computation. Instead, we adopt a simplified design as in [38]. The RoI pooling layer is added at last111The last 1×1111\times 1 dimension reduction layer is changed to outputs 256-D features.. On top of the pooled RoI features, two fc layers of dimension 102410241024 are added, followed by the bounding box regression and the classification branches. Although such simplification (from 10 layer conv5 block to 2 fc layers) would slightly decrease the accuracy, it still makes a strong enough baseline and is not a concern in this work.
items.zh: Faster R-CNN [47] 是最先进的检测器。在我们的实现中，RPN分支添加在conv4块的顶部，遵循[47]。在之前的实践[22, 24]中，RoI池化层插入在ResNet-101的conv4和conv5块之间，为每个RoI保留10层。这种设计实现了良好的准确性，但每个RoI的计算量很高。相反，我们采用[38]中的简化设计。RoI池化层添加在最后（最后一个1×1降维层改为输出256维特征）。在池化的RoI特征之上，添加两个维度为1024的全连接层，然后是边界框回归和分类分支。尽管这种简化（从10层conv5块到2个全连接层）会略微降低准确性，但它仍然构成了一个足够强的基线，并且在本工作中不是问题。

items.en: Optionally, the RoI pooling layer can be changed to deformable RoI pooling.
items.zh: 可选地，RoI池化层可以改为可变形RoI池化。

items.en: R-FCN [7] is another state-of-the-art detector. It has negligible per-RoI computation cost. We follow the original implementation. Optionally, its RoI pooling layer can be changed to deformable position-sensitive RoI pooling.
items.zh: R-FCN [7] 是另一种最先进的检测器。它具有可忽略的每个RoI计算成本。我们遵循原始实现。可选地，其RoI池化层可以改为可变形位置敏感RoI池化。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Each image triplet shows the sampling locations (93=729superscript937299^{3}=729 red points in each image) in three levels of 3×3333\times 3 deformable filters (see Figure 5 as a reference) for three activation units (green points) on the background (left), a small object (middle), and a large object (right), respectively.
items.capZh: 图6：每个图像三元组显示了三个激活单元（绿色点）在背景（左）、小物体（中）和大物体（右）上的三个级别的3×3可变形滤波器（参见图5作为参考）的采样位置（每个图像中93=729个红点）。

items.capEn: Figure 7: Illustration of offset parts in deformable (positive sensitive) RoI pooling in R-FCN [7] and 3×3333\times 3 bins (red) for an input RoI (yellow). Note how the parts are offset to cover the non-rigid objects.
items.capZh: 图7：R-FCN [7]中可变形（位置敏感）RoI池化的偏移部分示意图，以及输入RoI（黄色）的3×3个bin（红色）。注意部分如何偏移以覆盖非刚性物体。

items.en: This work is built on the idea of augmenting the spatial sampling locations in convolution and RoI pooling with additional offsets and learning the offsets from target tasks.
items.zh: 这项工作建立在通过额外偏移增强卷积和RoI池化中的空间采样位置并从目标任务中学习偏移的思想之上。

items.en: When the deformable convolution are stacked, the effect of composited deformation is profound. This is exemplified in Figure 5. The receptive field and the sampling locations in the standard convolution are fixed all over the top feature map (left). They are adaptively adjusted according to the objects’ scale and shape in deformable convolution (right). More examples are shown in Figure 6. Table 2 provides quantitative evidence of such adaptive deformation.
items.zh: 当可变形卷积堆叠时，复合变形的效果是深远的。图5中举例说明了这一点。标准卷积中的感受野和采样位置在整个顶部特征图上固定（左）。在可变形卷积中，它们根据物体的尺度和形状自适应调整（右）。更多示例见图6。表2提供了这种自适应变形的定量证据。

items.en: The effect of deformable RoI pooling is similar, as illustrated in Figure 7. The regularity of the grid structure in standard RoI pooling no longer holds. Instead, parts deviate from the RoI bins and move onto the nearby object foreground regions. The localization capability is enhanced, especially for non-rigid objects.
items.zh: 可变形RoI池化的效果类似，如图7所示。标准RoI池化中网格结构的规则性不再保持。相反，部分偏离RoI bin并移动到附近的物体前景区域。定位能力得到增强，特别是对于非刚性物体。

items.en: Our work is related to previous works in different aspects. We discuss the relations and differences in details.
items.zh: 我们的工作与以往的工作在不同方面相关。我们详细讨论关系和差异。

items.en: Spatial Transform Networks (STN) [26] It is the first work to learn spatial transformation from data in a deep learning framework. It warps the feature map via a global parametric transformation such as affine transformation. Such warping is expensive and learning the transformation parameters is known difficult. STN has shown successes in small scale image classification problems. The inverse STN method [37] replaces the expensive feature warping by efficient transformation parameter propagation.
items.zh: 空间变换网络（STN）[26] 是第一个在深度学习框架中从数据学习空间变换的工作。它通过全局参数变换（如仿射变换）对特征图进行扭曲。这种扭曲计算昂贵，且学习变换参数已知困难。STN在小规模图像分类问题上取得了成功。逆STN方法[37]通过高效的变换参数传播替代了昂贵的特征扭曲。

items.en: The offset learning in deformable convolution can be considered as an extremely light-weight spatial transformer in STN [26]. However, deformable convolution does not adopt a global parametric transformation and feature warping. Instead, it samples the feature map in a local and dense manner. To generate new feature maps, it has a weighted summation step, which is absent in STN.
items.zh: 可变形卷积中的偏移学习可以被视为STN [26]中一个极其轻量级的空间变换器。然而，可变形卷积不采用全局参数变换和特征扭曲。相反，它以局部和密集的方式采样特征图。为了生成新的特征图，它有一个加权求和步骤，这在STN中是不存在的。

items.en: Deformable convolution is easy to integrate into any CNN architectures. Its training is easy. It is shown effective for complex vision tasks that require dense (e.g., semantic segmentation) or semi-dense (e.g., object detection) predictions. These tasks are difficult (if not infeasible) for STN [26, 37].
items.zh: 可变形卷积易于集成到任何CNN架构中。其训练简单。它被证明对于需要密集（如语义分割）或半密集（如目标检测）预测的复杂视觉任务有效。这些任务对于STN [26, 37]来说是困难的（如果不是不可行的）。

items.en: Active Convolution [27] This work is contemporary. It also augments the sampling locations in the convolution with offsets and learns the offsets via back-propagation end-to-end. It is shown effective on image classification tasks.
items.zh: 主动卷积 [27] 这项工作与本文同期。它也通过偏移增强卷积中的采样位置，并通过反向传播端到端地学习偏移。它在图像分类任务上被证明有效。

items.en: Two crucial differences from deformable convolution make this work less general and adaptive. First, it shares the offsets all over the different spatial locations. Second, the offsets are static model parameters that are learnt per task or per training. In contrast, the offsets in deformable convolution are dynamic model outputs that vary per image location. They model the dense spatial transformations in the images and are effective for (semi-)dense prediction tasks such as object detection and semantic segmentation.
items.zh: 与可变形卷积的两个关键区别使得这项工作不那么通用和自适应。首先，它在不同空间位置共享偏移。其次，偏移是静态模型参数，每个任务或每次训练学习。相比之下，可变形卷积中的偏移是动态模型输出，随图像位置变化。它们建模图像中的密集空间变换，并对（半）密集预测任务（如目标检测和语义分割）有效。

items.en: Effective Receptive Field [43] It finds that not all pixels in a receptive field contribute equally to an output response. The pixels near the center have much larger impact. The effective receptive field only occupies a small fraction of the theoretical receptive field and has a Gaussian distribution. Although the theoretical receptive field size increases linearly with the number of convolutional layers, a surprising result is that, the effective receptive field size increases linearly with the square root of the number, therefore, at a much slower rate than what we would expect.
items.zh: 有效感受野 [43] 发现感受野中并非所有像素对输出响应贡献相同。中心附近的像素影响更大。有效感受野仅占理论感受野的一小部分，并具有高斯分布。尽管理论感受野大小随卷积层数线性增加，但一个令人惊讶的结果是，有效感受野大小随层数的平方根线性增加，因此增长速度远慢于预期。

items.en: This finding indicates that even the top layer’s unit in deep CNNs may not have large enough receptive field. This partially explains why atrous convolution [23] is widely used in vision tasks (see below). It indicates the needs of adaptive receptive field learning.
items.zh: 这一发现表明，即使是深度CNN最顶层的单元也可能没有足够大的感受野。这在一定程度上解释了为什么空洞卷积[23]在视觉任务中被广泛使用（见下文）。它表明了自适应感受野学习的必要性。

items.en: Deformable convolution is capable of learning receptive fields adaptively, as shown in Figure 5, 6 and Table 2.
items.zh: 可变形卷积能够自适应地学习感受野，如图5、图6和表2所示。

items.en: Atrous convolution [23] It increases a normal filter’s stride to be larger than 111 and keeps the original weights at sparsified sampling locations. This increases the receptive field size and retains the same complexity in parameters and computation. It has been widely used for semantic segmentation [41, 5, 54] (also called dilated convolution in [54]), object detection [7], and image classification [55].
items.zh: 空洞卷积[23]：它将普通滤波器的步长增加到大于1，并在稀疏采样位置保持原始权重。这增加了感受野大小，同时保持了参数和计算复杂度不变。它已被广泛用于语义分割[41, 5, 54]（在[54]中也称为膨胀卷积）、目标检测[7]和图像分类[55]。

items.en: Deformable convolution is a generalization of atrous convolution, as easily seen in Figure 1 (c). Extensive comparison to atrous convolution is presented in Table 3.
items.zh: 可变形卷积是空洞卷积的泛化，如图1(c)所示。与空洞卷积的广泛比较见表3。

items.en: Deformable Part Models (DPM) [11] Deformable RoI pooling is similar to DPM because both methods learn the spatial deformation of object parts to maximize the classification score. Deformable RoI pooling is simpler since no spatial relations between the parts are considered.
items.zh: 可变形部件模型（DPM）[11]：可变形RoI池化与DPM类似，因为两种方法都学习目标部件的空间变形以最大化分类得分。可变形RoI池化更简单，因为没有考虑部件之间的空间关系。

items.en: DPM is a shallow model and has limited capability of modeling deformation. While its inference algorithm can be converted to CNNs [17] by treating the distance transform as a special pooling operation, its training is not end-to-end and involves heuristic choices such as selection of components and part sizes. In contrast, deformable ConvNets are deep and perform end-to-end training. When multiple deformable modules are stacked, the capability of modeling deformation becomes stronger.
items.zh: DPM是一个浅层模型，建模变形能力有限。虽然其推理算法可以通过将距离变换视为一种特殊的池化操作转换为CNN[17]，但其训练不是端到端的，并且涉及启发式选择，如组件和部件大小的选择。相比之下，可变形ConvNet是深层的，并且进行端到端训练。当多个可变形模块堆叠时，建模变形能力变得更强。

items.en: DeepID-Net [44] It introduces a deformation constrained pooling layer which also considers part deformation for object detection. It therefore shares a similar spirit with deformable RoI pooling, but is much more complex. This work is highly engineered and based on RCNN [16]. It is unclear how to adapt it to the recent state-of-the-art object detection methods [47, 7] in an end-to-end manner.
items.zh: DeepID-Net[44]：它引入了一个受变形约束的池化层，该层也考虑了目标检测中的部件变形。因此，它与可变形RoI池化有相似的精神，但复杂得多。这项工作高度工程化，基于RCNN[16]。目前尚不清楚如何以端到端的方式将其适应于最新的目标检测方法[47, 7]。

items.en: Spatial manipulation in RoI pooling Spatial pyramid pooling [34] uses hand crafted pooling regions over scales. It is the predominant approach in computer vision and also used in deep learning based object detection [21, 15].
items.zh: RoI池化中的空间操作：空间金字塔池化[34]使用手工设计的跨尺度池化区域。它是计算机视觉中的主要方法，也用于基于深度学习的目标检测[21, 15]。

items.en: Learning the spatial layout of pooling regions has received little study. The work in [28] learns a sparse subset of pooling regions from a large over-complete set. The large set is hand engineered and the learning is not end-to-end.
items.zh: 学习池化区域的空间布局研究较少。[28]中的工作从一个大的过完备集合中学习池化区域的稀疏子集。这个大的集合是手工设计的，并且学习不是端到端的。

items.en: Deformable RoI pooling is the first to learn pooling regions end-to-end in CNNs. While the regions are of the same size currently, extension to multiple sizes as in spatial pyramid pooling [34] is straightforward.
items.zh: 可变形RoI池化是第一个在CNN中端到端学习池化区域的方法。虽然目前区域大小相同，但扩展到空间金字塔池化[34]中的多尺寸是直接的。

items.en: Transformation invariant features and their learning There have been tremendous efforts on designing transformation invariant features. Notable examples include scale invariant feature transform (SIFT) [42] and ORB [49] (O for orientation). There is a large body of such works in the context of CNNs. The invariance and equivalence of CNN representations to image transformations are studied in [36]. Some works learn invariant CNN representations with respect to different types of transformations such as [50], scattering networks [3], convolutional jungles [32], and TI-pooling [33]. Some works are devoted for specific transformations such as symmetry [13, 9], scale [29], and rotation [53].
items.zh: 变换不变特征及其学习：在设计变换不变特征方面已有大量努力。著名的例子包括尺度不变特征变换（SIFT）[42]和ORB[49]（O代表方向）。在CNN背景下也有大量此类工作。CNN表示对图像变换的不变性和等价性在[36]中进行了研究。一些工作学习针对不同类型变换的不变CNN表示，例如[50]、散射网络[3]、卷积丛林[32]和TI池化[33]。一些工作致力于特定变换，如对称性[13, 9]、尺度[29]和旋转[53]。

items.en: As analyzed in Section 1, in these works the transformations are known a priori. The knowledge (such as parameterization) is used to hand craft the structure of feature extraction algorithm, either fixed in such as SIFT, or with learnable parameters such as those based on CNNs. They cannot handle unknown transformations in the new tasks.
items.zh: 如第1节所分析，在这些工作中，变换是先验已知的。这些知识（如参数化）被用于手工设计特征提取算法的结构，要么是固定的（如SIFT），要么具有可学习参数（如基于CNN的方法）。它们无法处理新任务中的未知变换。

items.en: In contrast, our deformable modules generalize various transformations (see Figure 1). The transformation invariance is learned from the target task.
items.zh: 相比之下，我们的可变形模块泛化了各种变换（见图1）。变换不变性是从目标任务中学习得到的。

items.en: Dynamic Filter [2] Similar to deformable convolution, the dynamic filters are also conditioned on the input features and change over samples. Differently, only the filter weights are learned, not the sampling locations like ours. This work is applied for video and stereo prediction.
items.zh: 动态滤波器[2]：与可变形卷积类似，动态滤波器也依赖于输入特征并随样本变化。不同之处在于，只学习滤波器权重，而不像我们这样学习采样位置。这项工作应用于视频和立体预测。

items.en: Combination of low level filters Gaussian filters and its smooth derivatives [30] are widely used to extract low level image structures such as corners, edges, T-junctions, etc. Under certain conditions, such filters form a set of basis and their linear combination forms new filters within the same group of geometric transformations, such as multiple orientations in Steerable Filters [12] and multiple scales in [45]. We note that although the term deformable kernels is used in [45], its meaning is different from ours in this work.
items.zh: 低层滤波器的组合：高斯滤波器及其平滑导数[30]被广泛用于提取低层图像结构，如角点、边缘、T型连接等。在某些条件下，这些滤波器构成一组基，它们的线性组合形成同一几何变换组内的新滤波器，例如可转向滤波器[12]中的多方向和[45]中的多尺度。我们注意到，尽管[45]中使用了术语“可变形核”，但其含义与本文不同。

items.en: Most CNNs learn all their convolution filters from scratch. The recent work [25] shows that it could be unnecessary. It replaces the free form filters by weighted combination of low level filters (Gaussian derivatives up to 4-th order) and learns the weight coefficients. The regularization over the filter function space is shown to improve the generalization ability when training data are small.
items.zh: 大多数CNN从头学习所有卷积滤波器。最近的工作[25]表明这可能是不必要的。它用低层滤波器（高达4阶的高斯导数）的加权组合替代自由形式滤波器，并学习权重系数。滤波器函数空间上的正则化被证明在训练数据较少时能提高泛化能力。

items.en: Above works are related to ours in that, when multiple filters, especially with different scales, are combined, the resulting filter could have complex weights and resemble our deformable convolution filter. However, deformable convolution learns sampling locations instead of filter weights.
items.zh: 上述工作与我们的相关之处在于，当多个滤波器（尤其是不同尺度的滤波器）组合时，得到的滤波器可能具有复杂的权重，类似于我们的可变形卷积滤波器。然而，可变形卷积学习的是采样位置而不是滤波器权重。

items.en: Semantic Segmentation We use PASCAL VOC [10] and CityScapes [6]. For PASCAL VOC, there are 202020 semantic categories. Following the protocols in [19, 41, 4], we use VOC 2012 dataset and the additional mask annotations in [18]. The training set includes 10,5821058210,582 images. Evaluation is performed on 1,44914491,449 images in the validation set. For CityScapes, following the protocols in [5], training and evaluation are performed on 2,97529752,975 images in the train set and 500500500 images in the validation set, respectively. There are 191919 semantic categories plus a background category.
items.zh: 语义分割：我们使用PASCAL VOC [10]和CityScapes [6]。对于PASCAL VOC，有20个语义类别。按照[19, 41, 4]中的协议，我们使用VOC 2012数据集和[18]中的额外掩码标注。训练集包含10,582张图像。评估在验证集的1,449张图像上进行。对于CityScapes，按照[5]中的协议，训练和评估分别在训练集的2,975张图像和验证集的500张图像上进行。有19个语义类别加上一个背景类别。

items.en: For evaluation, we use the mean intersection-over-union (mIoU) metric defined over image pixels, following the standard protocols [10, 6]. We use mIoU@V and mIoU@C for PASCAl VOC and Cityscapes, respectively.
items.zh: 评估时，我们使用基于图像像素的平均交并比（mIoU）指标，遵循标准协议[10, 6]。对于PASCAL VOC和Cityscapes，分别使用mIoU@V和mIoU@C。

items.en: In training and inference, the images are resized to have a shorter side of 360360360 pixels for PASCAL VOC and 1,02410241,024 pixels for Cityscapes. In SGD training, one image is randomly sampled in each mini-batch. A total of 30k and 45k iterations are performed for PASCAL VOC and Cityscapes, respectively, with 8 GPUs and one mini-batch on each. The learning rates are 10−3superscript10310^{-3} and 10−4superscript10410^{-4} in the first 2323\frac{2}{3} and the last 1313\frac{1}{3} iterations, respectively.
items.zh: 在训练和推理中，对于PASCAL VOC，图像被调整为短边360像素；对于Cityscapes，短边为1,024像素。在SGD训练中，每个小批量随机采样一张图像。对于PASCAL VOC和Cityscapes，分别进行30k和45k次迭代，使用8个GPU，每个GPU处理一个小批量。学习率在前2/3次迭代中为10^{-3}，在后1/3次迭代中为10^{-4}。

items.en: Object Detection We use PASCAL VOC and COCO [39] datasets. For PASCAL VOC, following the protocol in [15], training is performed on the union of VOC 2007 trainval and VOC 2012 trainval. Evaluation is on VOC 2007 test. For COCO, following the standard protocol [39], training and evaluation are performed on the 120k images in the trainval and the 20k images in the test-dev, respectively.
items.zh: 目标检测 我们使用PASCAL VOC和COCO [39]数据集。对于PASCAL VOC，遵循[15]中的协议，在VOC 2007 trainval和VOC 2012 trainval的并集上进行训练。评估在VOC 2007 test上进行。对于COCO，遵循标准协议[39]，分别在trainval的120k张图像和test-dev的20k张图像上进行训练和评估。

items.en: For evaluation, we use the standard mean average precision (mAP) scores [10, 39]. For PASCAL VOC, we report mAP scores using IoU thresholds at 0.5 and 0.7. For COCO, we use the standard COCO metric of mAP@[0.5:0.95], as well as mAP@0.5.
items.zh: 对于评估，我们使用标准平均精度（mAP）分数[10, 39]。对于PASCAL VOC，我们报告使用IoU阈值0.5和0.7的mAP分数。对于COCO，我们使用标准COCO指标mAP@[0.5:0.95]以及mAP@0.5。

items.en: In training and inference, the images are resized to have a shorter side of 600 pixels. In SGD training, one image is randomly sampled in each mini-batch. For class-aware RPN, 256 RoIs are sampled from the image. For Faster R-CNN and R-FCN, 256 and 128 RoIs are sampled for the region proposal and the object detection networks, respectively. 7×7777\times 7 bins are adopted in RoI pooling. To facilitate the ablation experiments on VOC, we follow [38] and utilize pre-trained and fixed RPN proposals for the training of Faster R-CNN and R-FCN, without feature sharing between the region proposal and the object detection networks. The RPN network is trained separately as in the first stage of the procedure in [47]. For COCO, joint training as in [48] is performed and feature sharing is enabled for training. A total of 30k and 240k iterations are performed for PASCAL VOC and COCO, respectively, on 8 GPUs. The learning rates are set as 10−3superscript10310^{-3} and 10−4superscript10410^{-4} in the first 2323\frac{2}{3} and the last 1313\frac{1}{3} iterations, respectively.
items.zh: 在训练和推理中，图像被调整为短边为600像素。在SGD训练中，每个小批量随机采样一张图像。对于类别感知RPN，从图像中采样256个RoI。对于Faster R-CNN和R-FCN，分别为区域提议网络和目标检测网络采样256和128个RoI。RoI池化采用7×7个bins。为了便于在VOC上进行消融实验，我们遵循[38]，使用预训练且固定的RPN提议来训练Faster R-CNN和R-FCN，区域提议网络和目标检测网络之间不共享特征。RPN网络按照[47]中过程的第一阶段单独训练。对于COCO，执行如[48]中的联合训练，并启用特征共享。在8个GPU上，PASCAL VOC和COCO分别进行30k和240k次迭代。学习率在前2/3次迭代中设置为10^{-3}，在后1/3次迭代中设置为10^{-4}。

items.en: Extensive ablation studies are performed to validate the efficacy and efficiency of our approach.
items.zh: 进行了广泛的消融研究以验证我们方法的有效性和效率。

items.en: Deformable Convolution Table 1 evaluates the effect of deformable convolution using ResNet-101 feature extraction network. Accuracy steadily improves when more deformable convolution layers are used, especially for DeepLab and class-aware RPN. The improvement saturates when using 333 deformable layers for DeepLab, and 666 for others. In the remaining experiments, we use 333 in the feature extraction networks.
items.zh: 可变形卷积 表1评估了使用ResNet-101特征提取网络的可变形卷积的效果。当使用更多可变形卷积层时，精度稳步提高，尤其是对于DeepLab和类别感知RPN。对于DeepLab，使用3个可变形层时改进达到饱和，对于其他任务则为6个。在其余实验中，我们在特征提取网络中使用3个可变形层。

items.en: We empirically observed that the learned offsets in the deformable convolution layers are highly adaptive to the image content, as illustrated in Figure 5 and Figure 6. To better understand the mechanism of deformable convolution, we define a metric called effective dilation for a deformable convolution filter. It is the mean of the distances between all adjacent pairs of sampling locations in the filter. It is a rough measure of the receptive field size of the filter.
items.zh: 我们经验性地观察到，可变形卷积层中学习到的偏移量高度适应图像内容，如图5和图6所示。为了更好地理解可变形卷积的机制，我们为可变形卷积滤波器定义了一个称为有效膨胀的度量。它是滤波器中所有相邻采样位置对之间距离的平均值。这是滤波器感受野大小的粗略度量。

items.en: We apply the R-FCN network with 333 deformable layers (as in Table 1) on VOC 2007 test images. We categorize the deformable convolution filters into four classes: small, medium, large, and background, according to the ground truth bounding box annotation and where the filter center is. Table 2 reports the statistics (mean and std) of the effective dilation values. It clearly shows that: 1) the receptive field sizes of deformable filters are correlated with object sizes, indicating that the deformation is effectively learned from image content; 2) the filter sizes on the background region are between those on medium and large objects, indicating that a relatively large receptive field is necessary for recognizing the background regions. These observations are consistent in different layers.
items.zh: 我们在VOC 2007测试图像上应用具有3个可变形层的R-FCN网络（如表1所示）。根据真实边界框标注和滤波器中心的位置，将可变形卷积滤波器分为四类：小、中、大和背景。表2报告了有效膨胀值的统计信息（均值和标准差）。它清楚地表明：1）可变形滤波器的感受野大小与目标大小相关，表明变形是从图像内容中有效学习到的；2）背景区域上的滤波器大小介于中型和大型目标之间，表明识别背景区域需要相对较大的感受野。这些观察结果在不同层中是一致的。

items.en: The default ResNet-101 model uses atrous convolution with dilation 222 for the last three 3×3333\times 3 convolutional layers (see Section 2.3). We further tried dilation values 444, 666, and 888 and reported the results in Table 3. It shows that: 1) accuracy increases for all tasks when using larger dilation values, indicating that the default networks have too small receptive fields; 2) the optimal dilation values vary for different tasks, e.g., 666 for DeepLab but 444 for Faster R-CNN; 3) deformable convolution has the best accuracy. These observations verify that adaptive learning of filter deformation is effective and necessary.
items.zh: 默认的ResNet-101模型在最后三个3×3卷积层中使用膨胀率为2的空洞卷积（见第2.3节）。我们进一步尝试了膨胀率4、6和8，并将结果报告在表3中。它表明：1）使用更大的膨胀率时，所有任务的精度都提高，表明默认网络的感受野太小；2）不同任务的最佳膨胀率不同，例如DeepLab为6，但Faster R-CNN为4；3）可变形卷积具有最佳精度。这些观察结果验证了滤波器变形的自适应学习是有效且必要的。

items.en: Deformable RoI Pooling It is applicable to Faster R-CNN and R-FCN. As shown in Table 3, using it alone already produces noticeable performance gains, especially at the strict mAP@0.7 metric. When both deformable convolution and RoI Pooling are used, significant accuracy improvements are obtained.
items.zh: 可变形RoI池化 它适用于Faster R-CNN和R-FCN。如表3所示，单独使用它已经产生了显著的性能提升，尤其是在严格的mAP@0.7指标上。当同时使用可变形卷积和RoI池化时，获得了显著的精度提升。

items.en: Model Complexity and Runtime Table 4 reports the model complexity and runtime of the proposed deformable ConvNets and their plain versions. Deformable ConvNets only add small overhead over model parameters and computation. This indicates that the significant performance improvement is from the capability of modeling geometric transformations, other than increasing model parameters.
items.zh: 模型复杂度和运行时间 表4报告了所提出的可变形ConvNet及其普通版本的模型复杂度和运行时间。可变形ConvNet仅增加了少量模型参数和计算开销。这表明显著的性能提升来自于建模几何变换的能力，而不是增加模型参数。

items.en: In Table 5, we perform extensive comparison between the deformable ConvNets and the plain ConvNets for object detection on COCO test-dev set. We first experiment using ResNet-101 model. The deformable versions of class-aware RPN, Faster R-CNN and R-FCN achieve mAP@[0.5:0.95] scores of 25.8%, 33.1%, and 34.5% respectively, which are 11%, 13%, and 12% relatively higher than their plain-ConvNets counterparts respectively. By replacing ResNet-101 by Aligned-Inception-ResNet in Faster R-CNN and R-FCN, their plain-ConvNet baselines both improve thanks to the more powerful feature representations. And the effective performance gains brought by deformable ConvNets also hold. By further testing on multiple image scales (the image shorter side is in [480, 576, 688, 864, 1200, 1400]) and performing iterative bounding box average [14], the mAP@[0.5:0.95] scores are increased to 37.5% for the deformable version of R-FCN. Note that the performance gain of deformable ConvNets is complementary to these bells and whistles.
items.zh: 在表5中，我们对COCO test-dev集上的可变形ConvNet和普通ConvNet进行了广泛的目标检测比较。我们首先使用ResNet-101模型进行实验。类别感知RPN、Faster R-CNN和R-FCN的可变形版本分别实现了25.8%、33.1%和34.5%的mAP@[0.5:0.95]分数，相对比其普通ConvNet对应物分别高出11%、13%和12%。通过在Faster R-CNN和R-FCN中将ResNet-101替换为Aligned-Inception-ResNet，由于更强大的特征表示，它们的普通ConvNet基线都有所提升。可变形ConvNet带来的有效性能增益仍然保持。通过进一步在多个图像尺度上测试（图像短边为[480, 576, 688, 864, 1200, 1400]）并执行迭代边界框平均[14]，R-FCN可变形版本的mAP@[0.5:0.95]分数提高到37.5%。请注意，可变形ConvNet的性能增益与这些附加技巧是互补的。

items.en: This paper presents deformable ConvNets, which is a simple, efficient, deep, and end-to-end solution to model dense spatial transformations. For the first time, we show that it is feasible and effective to learn dense spatial transformation in CNNs for sophisticated vision tasks, such as object detection and semantic segmentation.
items.zh: 本文提出了可变形ConvNet，这是一种简单、高效、深度且端到端的解决方案，用于建模密集空间变换。我们首次表明，在CNN中学习密集空间变换对于复杂的视觉任务（如目标检测和语义分割）是可行且有效的。

items.en: The Aligned-Inception-ResNet model was trained and investigated by Kaiming He, Xiangyu Zhang, Shaoqing Ren, and Jian Sun in unpublished work.
items.zh: Aligned-Inception-ResNet模型由Kaiming He、Xiangyu Zhang、Shaoqing Ren和Jian Sun在未发表的工作中训练和研究。

items.capZh: 图8：Aligned-Inception-ResNet不同阶段的Inception残差块（IRB），其中不同阶段的维度用斜杠分隔（conv2/conv3/conv4/conv5）。

items.en: In the original Inception-ResNet [51] architecture, multiple layers of valid convolution/pooling are utilized, which brings feature alignment issues for dense prediction tasks. For a cell on the feature maps close to the output, its projected spatial location on the image is not aligned with the location of its receptive field center. Meanwhile, the task specific networks are usually designed under the alignment assumption. For example, in the prevalent FCNs for semantic segmentation, the features from a cell are leveraged to predict the pixel’s label at the corresponding projected image location.
items.zh: 在原始的Inception-ResNet [51]架构中，使用了多层有效卷积/池化，这给密集预测任务带来了特征对齐问题。对于靠近输出的特征图上的一个单元，其在图像上的投影空间位置与其感受野中心的位置不对齐。同时，任务特定网络通常是在对齐假设下设计的。例如，在用于语义分割的流行FCN中，利用一个单元的特征来预测对应投影图像位置的像素标签。

items.en: To remedy this issue, the network architecture is modified [20], called “Aligned-Inception-ResNet” and shown in Table 6. When the feature dimension changes, a 1×1111\times 1 convolution layer with stride 2 is utilized. There are two main differences between Aligned-Inception-ResNet and the original Inception-ResNet [51]. Firstly, Aligned-Inception-ResNet does not have the feature alignment problem, by proper padding in convolutional and pooling layers. Secondly, Aligned-Inception-ResNet consists of repetitive modules, whose design is simpler than the original Inception-ResNet architectures.
items.zh: 为了解决这个问题，网络架构被修改[20]，称为“Aligned-Inception-ResNet”，如表6所示。当特征维度变化时，使用步长为2的1×1卷积层。Aligned-Inception-ResNet与原始Inception-ResNet [51]有两个主要区别。首先，通过在卷积和池化层中进行适当填充，Aligned-Inception-ResNet没有特征对齐问题。其次，Aligned-Inception-ResNet由重复模块组成，其设计比原始Inception-ResNet架构更简单。

items.en: The Aligned-Inception-ResNet model is pre-trained on ImageNet-1K classification [8]. The training procedure follows [22]. Table 7 reports the model complexity, top-1 and top-5 classification errors.
items.zh: Aligned-Inception-ResNet 模型在 ImageNet-1K 分类任务上进行了预训练 [8]。训练过程遵循 [22]。表 7 报告了模型复杂度、top-1 和 top-5 分类错误。
